overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a concrete promenade beneath elevated highways, passing industrial structures and neon-lit skyscrapers while ascending to an upper level walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing on the promenade ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with multiple support pillars and shadowed underside
concrete industrial building with exposed pipes and machinery adjacent to the water
wide concrete walkway littered with scattered papers and debris
tall buildings covered with glowing holographic advertisements and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive elevated highway. The player walks forward on a concrete path littered with debris, approaching a group of three NPCs standing ahead. Industrial structures line the left side while neon-lit skyscrapers are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront with industrial structures and distant corporate towers

events.description: emerges from under the overpass into open sunlight with full visibility of the sky
turns to look left at the water and industrial buildings while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking past pedestrians while panning to observe the waterfront industrial area and distant Arasaka tower

notable_agents.action: three pedestrians standing in a group conversing near the promenade railing

entered.detail: green metal bridge structure spanning across the water canal
tall distinctive skyscraper with gold geometric patterns and '03' signage near the top
murky waterway running parallel to the promenade with concrete retaining walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area into bright morning sunlight, the player passes a group of NPCs while the view opens to reveal the water canal and the iconic Arasaka tower in the distance. The camera pans to observe the industrial waterfront structures before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with outdoor seating beneath highway overpass

events.description: enters covered plaza area with picnic tables and benches arranged under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty plaza area passing rows of tables and benches

entered.detail: concrete plaza with multiple picnic tables and benches arranged in rows beneath the overpass
wide staircase with metal railings leading up to the elevated highway level

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered plaza beneath the highway overpass, walking past empty picnic tables and benches. The area is sheltered from direct sunlight, with a staircase visible on the right leading to an upper level. The Arasaka tower and bridge are now behind the player.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase ascending to upper walkway level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs to the upper level walkway
reaches the top of the stairs and emerges onto the upper walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while holding the railing, transitioning from lower to upper promenade level

entered.detail: black metal safety railing along the edge of the upper walkway overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase, holding the metal railing while climbing. The perspective shifts upward, revealing the water canal from a higher vantage point. Upon reaching the top, the scene transitions to an upper level walkway with a metal railing overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront walkway with city views

events.description: continues walking along the upper level with expanded view of the city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade overlooking the water with panoramic views of the city

segments.scene_description: Now on the upper walkway, the player continues forward with a metal railing on the left overlooking the water canal. The green bridge span becomes visible again in the distance, and the city skyline stretches ahead. The perspective offers a commanding view of the industrial waterfront complex below and the towering skyscrapers beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed industrial promenade into bright daylight before returning to the shelter of a concrete plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving along a debris-strewn concrete path past industrial structures toward a group of NPCs. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens into bright morning sunlight to reveal a water canal and the towering Arasaka tower in the distance. The view then pans across the industrial waterfront before the camera moves forward, shifting back into the shade of a covered plaza filled with empty picnic tables and benches. Finally, the perspective passes a staircase leading to an upper level as the tower and bridge recede behind the viewer.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a ground-level promenade to an elevated walkway, shifting from a confined climb to an expansive urban vista. It begins with the camera approaching and climbing a wide concrete staircase, gripping a metal railing as the perspective tilts upward to reveal the water canal below. As the player reaches the top, the scene transitions seamlessly onto an upper-level walkway where the railing continues to guide the path alongside the water. The view then opens up to reveal a distant green bridge span and a commanding perspective of the industrial waterfront complex. Finally, the camera moves forward, expanding the horizon to encompass the towering skyscrapers of the city skyline stretching ahead.
